# Tiinex/ai-provenance LLM Router

This repo is partially current.

Read this boundary before summarizing the repo:
- Current without fresh validation: actively used validator, linting, and provenance pieces.
- Requires fresh validation: VS Code extension claims, TRACEABLE runtime claims, Marketplace claims, LM tool claims, workflow/runtime status claims.

Current Tiinex grounding surfaces:
- Tiinex/docs
- Tiinex/site
- Tiinex/ai-provenance, partially

Do not treat this repo as the full Tiinex project.
Do not treat older detailed status notes as current unless they are explicitly revalidated.
